metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_865
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The paper characterizes the sub cellular localization of both mu-type and delta-type opioid receptors using immuogold-silver and peroxidase labelling.
Figure 1 is a quantification of the labelled profiles, sowing a significant labeling at the presynaptic terminal.
Figure 2 presents a quantification, showing that in labelled terminals, a large proportion of mu-tpye immunolabeling is at the membrane, but not in the active zone region.
Figure 5c,d show two profiles of axons with mu-type immunoreactivity.
Figure 6 is a scheme illustrating the main sub cellular localization of the receptors.. Experimental description: 'Seven adult male Sprague Dawley rats (250-350 gm; Taconic, Germantown, NY) were anesthetized with sodium pentobarbital (100 mg/kg, i.p.).'
